summary:
# 7-Lane Parallel Execution Session — Complete

## Session Overview
A massive 7-lane parallel execution session implementing Phase 4 deferred reliability items and Phase 5 integrity features. All 7 lanes completed concurrently with a targeted integration repair pass resolving 4 cross-lane type errors.

## Lanes Completed

### Lane 1 — Foundation (plan)
- Verified pre-existing binder persistence fix + RuntimeEvent columns
- Added campaignId/laneId/role to event-store.ts filters and event-bridge.ts extraction  
- Created 4 JSON Schema files: review_manifest, builder_publication_record, verification_record, prepublication_review_cycle
- Wired campaign module (7 layers) into app-runtime.ts
- Sent execution directives to all 6 implementation lanes

### Lane 2 — Tool Porting (execution)
- Ported 27 tools from .opencode/tool/ (plugin SDK) to packages/opencode/src/tool/ (Effect-based)
- 18 new Effect-based implementations: analytics, json_query, log_activity, preflight_check, produce_fragment, roadmap_deprecate/init/next/prioritize/progress, smart_bash/bun/find/git/grep/sd, task_board, verify_handoff
- 9 tools reused existing Effect implementations
- All registered in registry.ts, typecheck clean

### Lane 3 — Config+Network Gating (execution)
- Step 7: Per-plugin config filtering — stripSecrets() removes secret-pattern keys from config for plugins without secrets.access capability
- Step 9: Created HookDispatchGuard (67 lines) — gates network hooks at dispatch boundary, bypasses always-allowed hooks, checks capability manifest
- Modified: plugin/index.ts, capability/index.ts, +new hook-dispatch-guard.ts

### Lane 4 — Health+Quarantine (execution)
- F12: Wired PGlite, DuckDB, MCP, Plugin to HealthRegistry via Effect.serviceOption pattern
- F13: PLUGIN_HEALTH_FILE persistence, crash counters, auto-quarantine at threshold=3, unquarantine + getCrashStatus methods
- Modified: db.pg.ts, adapter.ts, db.duckdb.ts, mcp/index.ts, plugin/index.ts

### Lane 5 — Campaign Truth Model (execution)
- 3 new files: campaign-event.ts (event bridge), context-packet.ts (LLM context assembly), projector.ts (CampaignProjector service)
- secretary.ts refactored: removed private reduceState, uses canonical state machine
- event-store.ts: query filter support for campaignId/laneId/role
- campaign/index.ts: exports for all new modules

### Lane 6 — Review Compression (execution)
- 7 new files: types.ts, weight.ts, comparison.ts, manifest.ts, index.ts, review-manifest.ts/txt
- Review module with comparison engine, weight rubric (7 categories), manifest generator
- review_manifest tool registered in registry.ts
- Typecheck clean

### Lane 7 — Evidence-Gated Push (execution)
- 4 new files: push-gate.ts (8 gate predicates), process-auditor.ts (6 protocol violations), push-record.ts (JSONL persistence), push_record.v1.schema.json
- state-machine.ts: added all_gates_pass precondition to push_ready→pushed transition
- campaign/index.ts: exports for all new modules
- Typecheck clean for all changed files

## Integration Validation
- 4 cross-lane type errors detected and fixed by dedicated repair agent:
  1. CampaignProjector redeclaration → renamed to Projector, fixed v4 API
  2. binder.ts layer type mismatch → added DatabaseAdapter.defaultLayer to provision chain
  3. integrator.ts defaultLayer property → fixed import path
  4. registry.test.ts missing Interface methods → added unquarantine/getCrashStatus stubs
- 115 pre-existing type errors remain across 10 files (not from this session)

## Key Files Created (by lane)
- 4 JSON schema files (docs/schemas/)
- 18 Effect-based tool files (packages/opencode/src/tool/)
- 17 .txt description files
- hook-dispatch-guard.ts
- 6 review module files
- 2 campaign module files (campaign-event.ts, context-packet.ts)
- projector.ts, push-gate.ts, process-auditor.ts, push-record.ts

## Key Files Modified
- campaign/index.ts (consolidated across L1, L5, L7)
- registry.ts (L2 + L6 registrations)
- plugin/index.ts (L3 + L4 changes)
- state-machine.ts (L7 all_gates_pass)
- secretary.ts (L5 refactoring)
- app-runtime.ts (L1 campaign wiring)
- event-store.ts, event-bridge.ts (L1 + L5)
- schema.duckdb.ts, binder.ts, integrator.ts, projector.ts (L1 + repair)
- registry.test.ts (repair)

## Lessons Registered
1. shared-file-append-only: Use commented section headers in barrel exports for conflict-free concurrent edits
2. integration-repair-post-multi-lane: Always run a targeted integration repair after multi-lane parallel execution
3. preflight-check-foundation-deps: Verify blocking deps exist before foundation lane starts
